data.title: BlackRock's Ethereum ETF hits $10B, becomes third fastest-growing fund in 32-year ETF history.
data.description: The iShares Ethereum Trust by BlackRock has achieved a milestone of $10 billion, making it one of the fastest-growing funds in the ETF industry. This achievement has been reached in a significantly short period, outpacing all but two funds in the industry's 32-year history.

data.title: Buenaventura Announces Second Quarter 2025 Results
data.description: In Lima, Peru, Compañia de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (“Buenaventura” or “the Company”), the country's largest publicly-traded precious metals mining company, has reported its financial results for the second quarter (2Q25) and six-month period ending on June 30, 2025 (6M25). The figures have been presented following IFRS (International Financial Reporting Standards) on a non-GAAP basis and are denominated in U.S. dollars. The company trades under the tickers NYSE: BVN and Lima Stock Exchange: BUE.LM.

data.title: AI Developer ‘Devin’ from Cognition aims for a $10B valuation despite not being mindblowing yet. Investors are eager to support the "autonomous coder."
data.description: Cognition, a company aiming for a remarkable $10 billion valuation, is attracting significant investor interest as they bet on its potential as a groundbreaking technology. The focus is on its "autonomous coder" technology and whether it will be the key to reaching this impressive valuation.

data.title: Inaugural Televerse Festival to feature Queer as Folk 25th Anniversary Reunion, premiere screenings of The Rainmaker and Talamasca, panel with director Tommy Schlamme, and more at JW Marriott, Aug. 14-16, 2025. Tickets on sale now.
data.description: In Los Angeles, the Television Academy, known for presenting the Emmy® Awards, has revealed new programming for its first-ever Televerse event. Tickets are currently on sale for all sessions taking place from August 14 to 16, 2025, at the JW Marriott at L.A. LIVE. Televerse is designed to offer an immersive festival experience for both television industry professionals and fans. The event will provide Academy members, industry insiders, and fans with rare opportunities to engage with leading creators, storytellers, and celebrities in the television industry.

data.title: Regenx Tech Corp. delays Annual Filings, unable to meet deadline of July 29, 2025, due to audit completion delays.
data.description: Edmonton, Alberta, today, the technology company Regenx Tech Corp. (CSE: RGX) (OTCQB: RGXT) (FSE: YRS WKN: A2DSW3) reports delays in completing its audit. The company will miss the July 29, 2025, deadline to file its Annual Filings due to this delay.

data.title: First Savings Financial Group reported $6.2M net income for Q3 2025, up from $4.1M in Q3 2024. Diluted EPS rose from $0.60 to $0.88.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Jeffersonville, Ind., First Savings Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSFG) announced its financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. The company, which is the parent of First Savings Bank, disclosed a net income of $6.2 million, translating to $0.88 per diluted share. In comparison, the same period in 2024 saw a net income of $4.1 million at $0.60 per diluted share. Adjusting for one-time items, the company's net income stood at $5.7 million and earnings per diluted share were $0.81 for the quarter ending June 30, 2025, a notable increase from $3.5 million and $0.52 per diluted share during the quarter concluding on June 30, 2024.

data.title: Trump increases pressure on Fed Chair Powell, visits Federal Reserve. Administration critiques Powell for economic performance and HQ renovation costs.
data.description: The administration has voiced numerous criticisms towards Jerome H. Powell, the central bank chair, regarding his management of the economy and the expenses associated with the institution’s headquarters.
